company_bio: Hajid Bin Wazir Automotive is a leader in the regional car trade. We are proud to be authorized distributors for top global brands and offer a comprehensive range of services including financing, shipping, and maintenance. Our goal is to provide a unique and reliable buying experience for every customer.

faq_q1: How can I book a test drive?
faq_a1: You can book a test drive directly from the car details page by clicking the "Book Test Drive" button.
faq_a2: We accept Mada, Visa, Mastercard, and bank transfer through our secure payment gateway.
faq_a3: Yes, we provide financing solutions through many local banks and Tabby and Tamara services.
faq_q4: How can I track my order status?
faq_a4: You can view your order status and service history in the "My Account" section under "Service History".

faqQuestion1: Is Hajid Bin Wazir company the financier for installment cars?
faqAnswer1: Hajid Bin Wazir company provides the car and completes all procedures from uploading your documents to financing entities until you receive your car, but financing is done through banks and financing companies.
faqQuestion2: Can I choose the monthly installment amount or duration?
faqAnswer2: Yes, you can customize the installment and duration according to your budget through the available financing entity options.
faqAnswer3: All financing entities we deal with have Sharia compliance certificates.
faqQuestion4: Can I apply if I have violations?
faqAnswer4: Yes, traffic violations do not prevent you from applying, but they may affect the maximum allowed financing ratio.
faqAnswer5: This depends on the financing entity and your credit record, as some offers with 0% down payment are available.
faqAnswer6: Yes, financing programs with a final payment are available to reduce the monthly installment, and it can be financed later.
